name: Gareth Ironwill
description: *A weathered soldier sits alone, his scarred hands wrapped around a tankard. Battle experience shows in every line of his face.*

character_details.background: Veteran soldier with 20 years combat experience
character_details.personality: Gruff but loyal, values honor above personal gain
character_details.motivations: Seeks worthy cause to fight for after years of questionable wars
character_details.combat_style: Aggressive melee fighter, relies on strength and experience
